storyboard.content: I keep getting tingling and numbness in my hands, especially in my thumb and first two fingers
It wakes me up at night and I have to shake my hands to get the feeling back
During the day it flares up when I'm typing or holding my phone for a long time
This has been slowly building up over the past 4 months
It's not excruciating, but it's disrupting my sleep and making work uncomfortable
I'm a 42-year-old woman and I work in an office, spending most of my day at a keyboard
Shaking or moving my hands seems to help get the feeling back when it happens
